title: President Emmanuel Macron’s Cultural Legacy At Risk After Louvre Chief Resigns
author: Mark Landler
fullText: President Emmanuel Macron has championed a refurbishment of the museum, but the fallout from a sensational heist has put his plans at risk.
summary: President Emmanuel Macron has championed a refurbishment of the museum, but the fallout from a sensational heist has put his plans at risk.
